blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,020 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
